_doc: (partId, optionLabel) → variantKey. Used ONLY for collapsed-label cases — when the option label sits in MORE THAN ONE Natural/Flat/Sharp column in 部材リスト.xlsx, this config picks which variant base to crop for the option's static `textureUrl`. Single-variant labels are auto-derived in cut-base-variants.mjs (no entry needed). See resources/reference/AUTHORING.md for details.
